name: Extract High-Value Universities Tasks from Stripe to WooCommerce
description: In Universities, Important notifications are missed in crowded inboxes. Focusing on tasks helps.
shortDescription: Prebuilt FlowMatch AI Original workflow using Webhook and Stripe and WooCommerce.

originalWorkflowJson.name: Extract High-Value Universities Tasks from Stripe to WooCommerce

normalizedWorkflowJson.name: Extract High-Value Universities Tasks from Stripe to WooCommerce

prerequisites: An active n8n instance installed locally, in a Docker container, or hosted on n8n Cloud.
Basic familiarity with importing JSON templates in n8n.
setupInstructions: Download this FlowMatch AI original blueprint JSON file.
Open your n8n workspace dashboard and import the blueprint file directly onto the node canvas.
Ensure you set up credentials for all connected integrations.
Test your trigger and run execution.
requiredCredentials: No custom credentials required for utility-only operations.
configurationSteps: Locate and open the trigger node "Webhook".
Open the action node "Save to Stripe" and configure your Stripe account credentials.
Open the action node "Save to WooCommerce" and configure your WooCommerce account credentials.
Map appropriate JSON expression fields between incoming trigger payload schemas and destination nodes.
testingSteps: Initiate test execution using n8n's "Test step" mode.
Execute target test scenario: Send a mock tasks payload to verify end-to-end delivery.
Confirm that the green execution markers light up indicating data is mapped correctly.
instructions.expectedResult: High-Value Tasks are successfully processed and available in WooCommerce.
troubleshooting: Check your credentials and API token authorizations if authorization failures block execution.
Ensure expressions reference correct upstream node output keys.
Review n8n execution histories logs for precise error stack traces.
securityNotes: Ensure that you select credentials stored in n8n's credential locker. Do not write API keys in plain text parameters.
Secure webhook ingestion endpoints using headers or secret token authorizations.
customizationIdeas: Add an AI translation step to qualify multilingual inputs.
Add a Slack webhook node to trigger alert messages on process exceptions.
